DEFENDANT GEARY-HYDE APARTMENTS, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS FURTHER RESPONSES TO THE FIRST SET OF REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS, FORM INTERROGATORIES (PART 1 OF 2)

Off Calendar Nov-09-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GEARY-HYDE APARTMENTS, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS FURTHER RESPONSES TO THE FIRST SET OF REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS, FORM INTERROGATORIES

PLAINTIFF NELSON PORTILLO'S (HEREAFTER EITHER "PLAINTIFF" OR "PORTILLO") MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITION OF DEFENDANT TAYEB ROUMILLA (HEREAFTER EITHER "DEFENDANT" OR "ROUMILLA") AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART AS FOLLOWS:

(1) WITHIN TEN (10) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, COUNSEL FOR PORTILLO AND ROUMILLA ARE TO MEET AND CONFER AN AGREE TO A DATE FOR A REMOTE DEPOSITION OF ROUMILLA TO OCCUR WITHIN THIRTY (30) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. TO THE EXTENT THAT AIRBNB REMAINS A PARTY IN THE LITIGATION, NOTICE SHOULD BE GIVEN TO IT OF THE AGREED DATE OF THE DEPOSITION.

(2) TO THE EXTENT THAT DEFENDANT HAS PREVIOUSLY PROVIDED DOCUMENTS TO PLAINTIFF WHICH ARE CALLED FOR IN THE DEPOSITION NOTICE HE NEED NOT PRODUCE THEM AGAIN, BUT CAN MERELY REFER TO THEM BY THE NUMBER DESIGNATED IN THE PRIOR PRODUCTION.

(3) THE COURT WILL IMPOSE NO MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST EITHER PARTY. DEFENDANT HAD ADVISED PLAINTIFF IN ADVANCE OF THE ORIGINAL DEPOSITION DATE THAT ROUMILLA WOULD NOT APPEAR ON THE UNILATERALLY DESIGNATED DATE WHILE STATING THAT HE WOULD BE PRODUCED AT A LATER AGREEABLE DATE

COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF SHOULD PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND EMAIL A COPY IN WORD FORM TO JUDGE PRO TEM RENNE AT rennepar85@gmail.com. COMPLAINCE WITH CRC 3.1312 IS REQUIRED.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)

Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Further Responses To The First Set Of Request For Production Of Documents, Special Interrogatories, Request For Admissions, Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Nov-09-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Geoffrey Wm. Steele, Esq. STEELE LAW GROUP, INC. (925) 968-3900 Steele@SteeleLawCA.com Attorneys for Plaintiff FRANCES ASTRID VOGEL
Matthew J. Hrutkay, Esq., NICOLSON LAW GROUP, (818) 858-1120 Canter@NicolsonLawGroup.com EServiceCAN@NicolsonLawGroup.com Attorneys for Defendants, GEARY-HYDE APARTMENTS, LLC

All parties present stipulate to Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne hearing today's motion.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as modified.

DEFENDANT GEARY-HYDE APARTMENTS, LLC'S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Further Responses To The First Set Of Request For Production Of Documents, Special Interrogatories, Request For Admissions, Form Interrogatories

DEFENDANT GEARY-HYDE APARTMENTS, LLC'S (HEREAFTER EITHER "DEFENDANT" OR "GEARY-HYDE") MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF FRANCES ASTRID VOGEL (HEREAFTER EITHER "PLAINTIFF" OR "VOGEL") TO FURTHER RESPOND TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION AND FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART AS FOLLOWS:

(1) PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO RFP NOS 4, 12, 13, 14, 17, 18, 21 & 22 ARE OVERRULED, EXCEPT FOR A CLAIM OF A/C PRIVILEGE. IN ADDITION, WHERE CALLED FOR THE PERIOD COVERED WILL BE FROM A DATE TWO YEARS PRIOR TO THE INCIDENT, NOT THE SIX YEARS CALLED FOR IN THE RFP.
(2) WITHIN TWENTY (20) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, PLAINTIFF WILL PROVIDE CODE COMPLIANT VERIFIED RESPONSES TO THE RPS REFERENCED IN PARAGRAPH (1) ABOVE AND DELIVER TO DEFENDANT COPIES OF ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS TO THOSE RFPS. TO THE EXTENT THAT PLAINTIFF IS WITHHOLDING ANY RESPONSIVE DOCUMENT ON THE BASIS OF A/C PRIVILEGE SHE WILL IDENTIFY THE DOCUMENT WITH SUFFICIENT SPECIFICTY TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO CHALLENGE THE CLAIM.
(3) DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL AS TO RFP NO. 5 IS DENIED.
(4) DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES NOS 1-6, 10, 11, 12, 13 & 25 IS DENIED.
(5) WITHIN TWENTY (20) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER PLAINTIFF WILL DELIVER TO DEFENDANT FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES NOS. 7, 8, 18, 19, 20 (LIMITED TO TWO YEARS PRIOR T0 THE INCIDENT), 21, 22, 23 (LIMITED TO TWO YEARS PRIOR TO THE INCIDENT), 24, 27, 28, 29 & 30.
(6) PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO RFA NOS.10[SIC] 11, 11[SIC] 12 & 19[20] ARE OVERRULED. WITHIN FIFTEEN (30) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, PLAINTIFF WILL RESPOND, WITHOUT OBJECTION WITH VERIFIED CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO THE ABOVE SPECIFIED RFAS. TO THE EXTENT THAT ANY OF THESE RESPONSES IS OTHER THAN AN ADMISSION, PLAINTIFF WILL DELIVER TO DEFENDANT FURTHER RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES NO' 17.1
(7) DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO CHANGE HER RESPONSE TO RFA NOS 8 & 12 IS DENIED.
(8) DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO FURTHER RESPOND TO FORM INTERROGATORIES 8.4, 8.7, 12.2, 12.3 IS GRANTED.
WITHIN THIRTY (30) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER PLAINTIFF WILL DELIVER TO DEFENDANT WITHOUT OBJECTION VERIFIED CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO THE ABOVE SPECIFIED FORM INTERROGATORIES.
(9) DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORY 17.1 IN RELATION TO RFAS NOS 1, 5, 6 & 7 IS DENIED. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO THE RESPONSES IN SUBPARAGRAPH (b) IN RELATION TO RFAS NOS 8, 9, 9[SIC]10, 12 [SIC] 13, 16[SIC] 17, 17 [SIC] 18 & 18 [SIC] 19. WITHIN THIRTY (30) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, PLAINTIFF WILL DELIVER TO DEFENDANTS WITHOUT OBJECTIONS VERIFIED RESPONSES SETTING FORTH THE FACTS SUPPORTING HER DENIAL OF THE RFA.

COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT/VERBATIM WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM (CRC 3.1312) AND EMAIL A COPY IN WORDFORM TO THE COURT AT rennepar85@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-31-2023 Set For Trial On Jun-17-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
